plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: ShieldHer needs your location to share it with your safety circle and analyze safe routes.
plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: ShieldHer needs your location to share it with your safety circle and analyze safe routes.

plugins.cameraPermission: ShieldHer needs camera access to capture photo evidence in the Vault.

infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: ShieldHer needs your location to share with your safety circle and analyze route safety.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: ShieldHer needs background location for Guardian Mode.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: ShieldHer uses the microphone to record audio evidence when SOS is activated.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: ShieldHer uses the camera to capture photo evidence in the Vault.
